title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Schneider Electric India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Schneider Electric India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Schneider Electric India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Schneider Electric India:
Schneider Electric India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India!
